pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Pairs SwiGLU + value-residual + gated-attention layers with Exclusive Self-Attn, EMA weights, and AdamW test-time tuning on thwu1’s base stack.
techniques: SwiGLU MLP with residual/gated attention blending
Exclusive Self-Attention in top layers to remove self-value bias
EMA-weight evaluation paired with AdamW test-time tuning
